description: Returns a list of all workflow templates for a given company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow template

created_at.description: Date when the template was created

updated_at.description: Date when the template was last updated

archived_at.description: Date when the template was archived

assigned_projects_count.description: Number of projects this template is assigned to

tool_type.description: The type of tool this template is for

tool_subtype.description: The subtype of tool this template is for (only applies to "correspondence" types)

latest_published_version.description: Latest published version of the template
